landing.hero: Protect Your Property. Verify Every Guest.
landing.subtitle: Security platform for hosts. Share and search guest history before confirming reservations.
landing.feature1Desc: Enter a guest name or email. Instantly see reports and warnings from other hosts.
landing.feature2Desc: Report problem guests. Help the community avoid damage, theft, and fraud.
landing.feature3Desc: Built by hosts, for hosts. Verified reports. Quality over quantity.

auth.joinDescription: Join Sentinel HostGuard to protect your property
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for a confirmation link, or you'll be redirected to the dashboard shortly.
auth.passwordMinError: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.confirmEmailDesc: We sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
auth.resetEmailSent: A password reset link has been sent to your email.
auth.passwordChanged: Your password has been changed successfully.

report.subtitle: Help the community by sharing your experience with a problematic guest.

settings.subtitle: Manage your personal information and preferences.
settings.propertiesCountHelp: How many properties do you manage?
settings.nicknameHelp: Optional. Max 30 characters, letters, numbers, _ and - allowed. Displayed in chat and suggestions.

settings.nicknameInvalid: Nickname can only contain letters, numbers, _ and -.

upload.dropOrClick: Drag photos here or click to select

chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Be the first!
chat.messageTooLong: Message must be 500 characters or less.

help.title: Help & Information
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Sentinel HostGuard
help.whatIsDesc: A community-driven platform for accommodation hosts (Airbnb, Booking, private apartments). Share experiences with problematic guests and verify a guest before confirming a reservation.
help.step2: Search for a guest by name or email
help.step3: Add a report if you had an experience with a problematic guest
help.step4: The community shares information for safer accommodation
help.featureSearch: Fuzzy search — find a guest even with typos
help.featureOcr: OCR Import — upload a reservation screenshot, we extract data automatically
help.featurePwa: PWA — install as an app on your phone
help.faqLegalAnswer: We only share factual experiences. We don't collect sensitive personal data. Each report is tied to a specific incident.
help.faqDispute: Can the guest dispute a report?
help.faqDisputeAnswer: Not in the current version. We plan to add a dispute process in the future.
help.faqVisibilityAnswer: All registered hosts. Guest email is always masked.
help.faqReport: How to report a false entry?
help.faqReportAnswer: Use the 'Report' button on any report that isn't yours. Moderators will review it.
help.faqPwa: How to install as an app?
help.faqPwaAnswer: In your browser, click 'Add to Home Screen'.

duplicates.title: Possible Duplicates Found
duplicates.description: We found existing guests that may match the person you are reporting. Please review before proceeding.
